---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Manciple
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case and why existing functionality is insufficient.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be specific about behavior, interface, and any configuration options.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative solutions or workarounds have you considered? Why is the proposed approach preferable?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references that help explain the feature request.
